getInfo.description: Get full name record by namehash (H256). Returns owner, expiry, capacity, fee, for_sale, last_block, and the block at which the record was read.

resolveName.description: Resolve a plain label (e.g. 'alice') to its full name record. Returns null if the name does not exist or is expired.

lookup.description: Get all DNS records stored for a namehash (H256). Returns an array of [record_type_code, bytes] pairs.

lookupByName.description: Get all DNS records for a plain label or dotted name (e.g. 'alice' or 'sub.alice'). Single round-trip equivalent of pns_nameToHash + pns_lookup.

getListing.description: Get the active marketplace listing for a plain label (e.g. 'alice'). Returns seller, price, expires_at, and the block at which the listing was read. Returns null if not listed.

nameToHash.description: Compute the namehash (H256) for a plain label or dotted name (e.g. 'alice' or 'sub.alice'). Returns null if the name is malformed. Use this to get the hash needed by pns_getInfo, pns_lookup, and pns_isUseable.

all.description: Return every registered name and its registrar info as an array of [namehash, info] pairs. Intended for indexers and explorers.

isUseable.description: Check whether a name (by namehash) is currently registered and not expired. Returns true if the name is in its active registration period.
